entry.title: IDC W15P7T16D0002 (P00020) awarded to L3HARRIS TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MANPACK PROGRAM MODIFICATION P00020 TO ADD DEFENSE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION SUPPLEMENT (DFARS) CLAUSE 252.225-7007,PROHIBITION ON ACQUISITION OF CERTAIN ITEMS FROM COMMUNIST CHINESE MILITARY COMPANIES.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, EXCEPT AIRBORNE

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T16D0002 (P00023) awarded to L3HARRIS TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (P00023) IS TO UPDATE THE PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS DOCUMENT (PRD) - ATTACHMENT 0001, VERSION 6.0, IN SECTION J OF THIS CONTRACT. THIS MODIFICATION IS MADE BILATERALLY PURSUANT TO THE AUTHORITY OF FAR 43.103(A)(3).

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, EXCEPT AIRBORNE

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T16D0002 (P00024) awarded to L3HARRIS TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD IS TO: ADD A001 LANGUAGE, ADD CLAUSE 52.204-30, REMOVE CLAUSE 252.223-7999, UPDATE THE SOW TO REMOVE DCMA, ADD GFP CLAUSE 252.245-7005, REMOVE CLAUSES 252.211-7007, 252.245-7001, -7002, -7004, UPDATE G CDRLS G001-G006 & UPDATE WARRANTY I/AS.
